subject: refactor(docs): delete local implementation patterns, fetch from glow-props
body:
Deleted all 7 local copies of implementation pattern files from
docs/implementations/. These are now fetched directly from the glow-props
repo via GitHub API every time — no local copies exist or should be created.

Updated CLAUDE.md with fetch instructions, added prohibition against
creating local copies. Updated AI_MISTAKES.md reference to clarify source.

Tags: documentation, cleanup, cross-project
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-project-alignment
Semver: patch
